emails.subject: Re: FW: 200 version
emails.body: Re: FW: 200 version Native load "The wholesale and retail power customers of MDEA on whose behalf MDEA, by statute, franchise, regulatory requirement, or contract, has undertaken an obligation to construct and operate MDEA's system to meet the reliable electric needs of such customers." paraphrased from FERC OATT. To: Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: FW: 200 version
emails.body: some comments A. 1st sentence --Remove "a" before dual fuel. Change delivers to deliver "Costs" (xi) Add "SPP or" before "Serc-imposed "Protocols" I don't think there are SERC Protocols (this may be from ERCOT agreement). "Serc ISO" There is not such thing yet. "SPP" Add "Reliability" after Electric Forwarded by Christi L Nicolay/HOU/ECT on 04/10/2001 03:30 PM To: Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: FW: 200 version
emails.body: some comments A. 1st sentence --Remove "a" before dual fuel. Change delivers to deliver "Costs" (xi) Add "SPP or" before "Serc-imposed "Protocols" I don't think there are SERC Protocols (this may be from ERCOT agreement). "Serc ISO" There is not such thing yet. "SPP" Add "Reliability" after Electric Forwarded by Christi L Nicolay/HOU/ECT on 04/10/2001 03:30 PM To: Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: Re: FW: 200 version
emails.body: Re: FW: 200 version Wow. I wonder how long it will take for me to get a good handle on this stuff? Thanks, Kay To: Rorschach, Reagan
